title: Automated Video Generator - Agentic Pipeline
script:
Meet the Automated Video Generator. [Visual: logo-automation.png] [Transition: slide] [Grade: warm]
A completely free, open source text to video pipeline. [Visual: github-profile.png] [Transition: zoomblur] [Grade: cinematic]
It turns any script into a professional short video. [Visual: ai coding code typing] [KenBurns: off]
With over four hundred voices and one hundred languages. [Visual: language voice translation] [Grade: vivid]
Plus automatic stock footage and background music. [Visual: video editing timeline music]
Built with TypeScript, Node.js, and Remotion. [Visual: software developer workspace] [Transition: cut]
And it runs entirely on your own machine. [Visual: data center server rack]
Deploy your own AI video pipeline today. [Visual: rocket launch innovation success]
